channel.title: fasouto/awesome-dataviz Weekly Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track your favorite github awesome repo, not just star it.

item.title: fasouto/awesome-dataviz Oct 7th - Oct 13th, 2019
item.description:
Websites

  • Data Visualization Society - The Data Visualization Society is an organization dedicated to fostering community for data visualization professionals.

item.title: fasouto/awesome-dataviz Sep 2nd - Sep 8th, 2019
item.description:
Python tools

  • three.pystars70 - Easy to use 3D library based on PyOpenGL. Inspired by Three.js.

    • Websites

  • Truth & Beauty Operations
  • vis4.net - Random thoughts on visualization and data journalism by Gregor Aisch
  • Visual Complexity - A site about the visualization of complex networks.

item.title: fasouto/awesome-dataviz Aug 19th - Aug 25th, 2019
item.description:
Python tools

  • Chartifystars2.9k - Bokeh wrapper that makes it easy for data scientists to create charts.

item.title: fasouto/awesome-dataviz Jun 10th - Jun 16th, 2019
item.description:
R tools

  • ggplot2 - A plotting system based on the grammar of graphics.

item.title: fasouto/awesome-dataviz May 20th - May 26th, 2019
item.description:
Python tools

  • PyVistastars800 – 3D plotting and mesh analysis through a streamlined interface for the Visualization Toolkit (VTK)

item.title: fasouto/awesome-dataviz Feb 11th - Feb 17th, 2019
item.description:
JavaScript tools

Maps

  • Deck.gl - WebGL framework for visual exploratory data analysis of large datasets.

    • Other tools

  • Kepler.gl - Geospatial analysis tool for large-scale data sets.

    • JavaScript tools

    Charting libraries

  • ApexCharts - Modern & Interactive SVG Charts.
  • TOAST UI Chartstars4.9k - Complete library with support for legacy browsers.

    • JavaScript tools

    React

  • BizChartsstars5.6k - Alibaba data visualization library based on G2 and React. English docs

item.title: fasouto/awesome-dataviz Oct 29th - Nov 4th, 2018
item.description:
R tools

  • visNetwork - Interactive network visualisations

item.title: fasouto/awesome-dataviz Oct 1st - Oct 7th, 2018
item.description:
Python tools

  • altair - Declarative statistical visualizations, based on Vega-Lite.

    • Twitter accounts

  • Mara Averick

    • Podcasts

  • DataFramed

item.title: fasouto/awesome-dataviz Jul 9th - Jul 15th, 2018
item.description:
JavaScript tools

React

  • DevExtreme React Chart - High-performance plugin-based React chart for Bootstrap and Material Design.

item.title: fasouto/awesome-dataviz Feb 12th - Feb 18th, 2018
item.description:
JavaScript tools

React

  • React Svg Texturesstars26 - Textures.js ported to React. Fully isomorphic.

item.title: fasouto/awesome-dataviz Dec 4th - Dec 10th, 2017
item.description:
Websites

  • Ann K. Emery's blog
  • eagereyes
  • EvergreenData
  • FlowingData
  • Gnuplotting - Gnuplot tutorials
  • Information is Beautiful
  • Lisa Rost thinks and discusses about why we dataviz
  • Makeover Monday blog - #MakeoverMonday on twitter
  • The Data Visualization Catalogue - A collection of data visualization methods, with pros and cons.
  • the functional art
  • The Open News blog - Open news has some good dataviz related articles from time to time
  • The Pudding
  • University of Washington Interactive Data Lab Papers

item.title: fasouto/awesome-dataviz Nov 27th - Dec 3rd, 2017
item.description:
Excel tools

  • Best Excel Maps - Choropleth maps for Microsoft Excel.

    • Podcasts

  • Data Stories

item.title: fasouto/awesome-dataviz Nov 20th - Nov 26th, 2017
item.description:
Markup-based tools

  • mermaidjs - A simple markdown-like script language for generating charts from text via javascript
  • viz-js.com - A hack to put Graphviz on the web
  • wavedrom.com - Draws your Timing Diagram or Waveform from simple textual description

item.title: fasouto/awesome-dataviz Nov 6th - Nov 12th, 2017
item.description:
Websites

  • Junk Charts - Kaiser Fung takes apart why certain datavizes work/don't work

item.title: fasouto/awesome-dataviz Oct 16th - Oct 22nd, 2017
item.description:
Python tools

  • mayai - interactive scientific data visualization and 3D plotting in Python.
  • vtk - 3D computer graphics, image processing, and visualization that includes a Python interface.
  • veusz - Python multiplatform GUI plotting tool and graphing library

item.title: fasouto/awesome-dataviz Oct 9th - Oct 15th, 2017
item.description:
JavaScript tools

Maps

  • Mapaelstars983 - jQuery plugin based on raphael.js to display vector maps.

item.title: fasouto/awesome-dataviz Aug 7th - Aug 13th, 2017
item.description:
JavaScript tools

React

  • nivostars8.7k - Supercharged dataviz components for React with isomorphic ability, demo.

item.title: fasouto/awesome-dataviz Apr 10th - Apr 16th, 2017
item.description:
Books

  • Data Visualization Toolkit by Barrett Austin Clark. Uses D3, Ruby on Rails, Postgres, PostGIS, & Leaflet.

item.title: fasouto/awesome-dataviz Apr 3rd - Apr 9th, 2017
item.description:
JavaScript tools

Charting libraries

  • MetricsGraphics.js - Optimized for time-series data.

    • Python tools

  • plotly - Interactive web based visualization built on top of plotly.jsstars13.2k

item.title: fasouto/awesome-dataviz Feb 20th - Feb 26th, 2017
item.description:
Python tools

  • holoviews - Complex and declarative visualizations from annotated data.

    • C++ tools

  • LargeVisstars634 - implementation of the LargeVis paper, used to visualize large-scale and high-dimensional data.

    • Other tools

  • Circos - Visualizes data in a circular layout, ideal for exploring relationships between objects or positions. Mirror on githubstars6.

item.title: fasouto/awesome-dataviz Feb 6th - Feb 12th, 2017
item.description:
C++ tools

  • PlotJugglerstars2.2k - open-source Qt5 application to plot charts (based on Qwt).

    • Python tools

  • missingnostars2.8k - provides flexible toolset of data-visualization utilities that allows quick visual summary of the completeness of your dataset, based on matplotlib.

item.title: fasouto/awesome-dataviz Jan 23rd - Jan 29th, 2017
item.description:
JavaScript tools

Charting libraries

  • Echartsstars46.3k - Highly customizable and interactive charts ready for big datasets. React wrapperstars3.2k

    • Other tools

  • RAW - Create web visualizations from CSV or Excel files.

    • Python tools

  • ggplotstars3.6k - plotting system based on R's ggplot2.

item.title: fasouto/awesome-dataviz Dec 5th - Dec 11th, 2016
item.description:
JavaScript tools

Maps

  • CARTOstars2.5k - CARTO is an open source tool that allows for the storage and visualization of geospatial data on the web.

item.title: fasouto/awesome-dataviz Nov 28th - Dec 4th, 2016
item.description:
Books

  • Interactive Data Visualization for the Web by Scott Murray. Available to read online. Focused on D3.

item.title: fasouto/awesome-dataviz Oct 24th - Oct 30th, 2016
item.description:
JavaScript tools

React

  • Rechartsstars16.3k - Declarative react components to render D3 charts.

    • Android tools

  • DecoViewstars969 - Animated circular wheel chart library.
  • WilliamChartstars4.6k - Simple chart library.

    • Python tools

  • seaborn - A library for making attractive and informative statistical graphics.

    • JavaScript tools

    Maps

  • DataMapsstars3.5k - Interactive SVG maps using D3.js.

    • JavaScript tools

    d3

  • See Awesome D3stars4.7k

item.title: fasouto/awesome-dataviz Oct 17th - Oct 23rd, 2016
item.description:
JavaScript tools

Maps

  • Cesiumstars7k - WebGL 3D globes and maps.

    • iOS tools

  • BEMSimpleLineGraphstars2.7k - Highly customizable and interactive line graphs.

item.title: fasouto/awesome-dataviz Sep 19th - Sep 25th, 2016
item.description:
Twitter accounts

  • Martin Wattenberg

    • JavaScript tools

    Misc

  • Vega - Vega is a visualization grammar, a declarative format for creating, saving, and sharing interactive visualization designs.

    • Python tools

  • toyplot - The kid-sized plotting toolkit for Python with grownup-sized goals.

    • Books

  • The Best American Infographics 2014 by Gareth Cook.
  • The Visual Display of Quantitative Information by Edward Tufte.
  • Visualization Analysis and Design by Tamara Munzner.
  • Design for Information by Isabel Meirelles.
  • The Wall Street Journal Guide to Information Graphics by Dona M. Wong

    • JavaScript tools

    React

  • React-visstars7.8k - React components to build data visualizations.
  • Victory - Composable components for building interactive data visualizations

item.title: fasouto/awesome-dataviz Aug 22nd - Aug 28th, 2016
item.description:
Python tools

  • diagramstars390 - Text mode diagrams using UTF-8 characters

item.title: fasouto/awesome-dataviz Jul 4th - Jul 10th, 2016
item.description:
iOS tools

  • Chartsstars24.2k - iOS port of MPAndroidChart. You can create charts for both platforms with very similar code.

    • JavaScript tools

    Charting libraries

  • dc.jsstars7.2k is an multi-Dimensional charting built to work natively with crossfilter.

    • R tools

  • lattice - trellis graphics for R

item.title: fasouto/awesome-dataviz Jun 13th - Jun 19th, 2016
item.description:
R tools

  • ggvis - A data visualization package with a syntax similar to ggplot2 which allows you to create rich interactive graphics.

item.title: fasouto/awesome-dataviz Feb 22nd - Feb 28th, 2016
item.description:
JavaScript tools

Charting libraries

  • Plotly.jsstars13.2k - Powerful declarative library with support for 20 chart types.

    • R tools

  • plotlystars2k - Interactive charts (including adding interactivity to ggplot2 output), cartograms and simple network diagrams

item.title: fasouto/awesome-dataviz Feb 15th - Feb 21st, 2016
item.description:
R tools

  • shiny - Framework for creating interactive applications/visualisations

item.title: fasouto/awesome-dataviz Jan 25th - Jan 31st, 2016
item.description:
Python tools

  • glumpystars912 - OpenGL scientific visualizations library.

item.title: fasouto/awesome-dataviz Dec 14th - Dec 20th, 2015
item.description:
Python tools

  • bokeh - Interactive Web Plotting for Python.

    • JavaScript tools

    Charting libraries

  • Epochstars5k - Perfect to create real-time charts.

    • Other tools

  • Gephistars4.3k - An open-source platform for visualizing and manipulating large graphs

item.title: fasouto/awesome-dataviz Nov 9th - Nov 15th, 2015
item.description:
Twitter accounts

  • Nadieh Bremer

item.title: fasouto/awesome-dataviz Oct 5th - Oct 11th, 2015
item.description:
Python tools

  • PyQtGraph - Interactive and realtime 2D/3D/Image plotting and science/engineering widgets.

item.title: fasouto/awesome-dataviz Sep 21st - Sep 27th, 2015
item.description:
Other tools

  • Chartedstars2.7k - A charting tool that produces automatic, shareable charts from any data file.

    • C++ tools

  • Visualization Toolkit (VTK) - open-source library for 3d Graphics, image processing and visualization.

    • Python tools

  • matplotlib - 2D plotting library.

    • Ruby tools

  • Chartkickstars5.8k - Create charts with one line of Ruby.

item.title: fasouto/awesome-dataviz Aug 10th - Aug 16th, 2015
item.description:
JavaScript tools

Maps

  • Leaflet - JavaScript library for mobile-friendly interactive maps.

    • JavaScript tools

    Misc

  • Vis.js - A dynamic visualization library including timeline, networks and graphs (2D and 3D).

item.title: fasouto/awesome-dataviz Jul 27th - Aug 2nd, 2015
item.description:
Python tools

  • VisPy - High-performance scientific visualization based on OpenGL.

    • JavaScript tools

    Charting libraries for graphs

  • Cytoscape.js - JavaScript library for graph drawing maintained by Cytoscape core developers.
  • Cola.js - A tool to create diagrams using constraint-based optimization techniques. Works with d3 and svg.js.

    • JavaScript tools

    Charting libraries

  • Dygraphs - Interactive line charts library that works with huge datasets.
  • TechanJS - Stock and financial charts.
  • Chart.js - Charts with the canvas tag.
  • Chartist.js - Responsive charts with great browser compatibility.

    • Twitter accounts

  • Alberto Cairo
  • Benjamin Wiederkehr
  • Mike Bostock
  • NYT Graphics
  • Visualizing

    • R tools

  • rbokeh - R Interface to Bokeh.
  • rgl - 3D Visualization Using OpenGL

    • Android tools

  • MPAndroidChartstars33.3k - A powerful & easy to use chart library.

    • JavaScript tools

    Misc

  • Textures.js - A library to create SVG patterns.

    • Other tools

  • Sparkstars5.7k - Sparklines for the shell. It have several implementations in different languages.
  • Lightning - A data-visualization server providing API-based access to reproducible, web-based, interactive visualizations.

item.title: fasouto/awesome-dataviz Jul 20th - Jul 26th, 2015
item.description:
JavaScript tools

Misc

  • Timeline.js - Create interactive timelines.
  • Pieconstars2.3k - Pie charts in your favicon.

    • JavaScript tools

    Charting libraries

  • Dimple - An object-oriented API for business analytics.
  • NVD3stars7.1k - A reusable charting library written in d3.js.

    • JavaScript tools

    Charting libraries for graphs

  • Sigma.js - JavaScript library dedicated to graph drawing.
  • VivaGraphstars3.4k - Graph drawing library for JavaScript.

    • iOS tools

  • PNChartstars9.8k - A simple and beautiful chart lib used in Piner and CoinsMan.
  • JBChartViewstars3.8k - Charting library for both line and bar graphs.

    • Golang tools

  • svgostars1.7k - Go Language Library for SVG generation.
